exampleSentences: Anh thích đắm mình trong âm nhạc mỗi khi cảm thấy mệt mỏi.
Chị ấy thường đắm vào công việc nên ít có thời gian rảnh.
Em muốn đắm trong không khí yên bình của vùng quê này.
notes:
đắm = to immerse, to sink deeply into something (water, feelings, activities). It can be physical, but more often it’s emotional or mental.

You’ll usually see it in fixed phrases like đắm mình trong or đắm chìm trong + noun (music, memories, love, work). It suggests being deeply absorbed, almost forgetting everything else.

It often goes with abstract things: âm nhạc, tình yêu, công việc, suy nghĩ.  

Related word: say đắm (adj) = deeply in love, passionately absorbed — strong emotional vibe.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He likes to immerse himself in music whenever he feels tired.
She often immerse herself in work so she has little free time.
I want to immerse myself in the peaceful atmosphere of this countryside.
